related_posts.content: Scheduled SoDEX v3 Mainnet Upgrade: Taking Our High Performance Orderbook to the Next Level Dear SoDEX Community, From our earliest Testnet days to the bustling ecosystem we have built  today, your feedback and stress-testing have been the bedrock of our growth. To make your experience even better,  we are thrilled to announce the official launch of SoDEX v3.

official_announcements.content: Scheduled SoDEX v3 Mainnet Upgrade: Taking Our High Performance Orderbook to the Next Level Dear SoDEX Community, From our earliest Testnet days to the bustling ecosystem we have built  today, your feedback and stress-testing have been the bedrock of our growth. To make your experience even better,  we are thrilled to announce the official launch of SoDEX v3. This major upgrade is designed to revolutionize our infrastructure, significantly enhancing the  block production stability and  API throughput. This ensures SoDEX can seamlessly serve millions of global traders on a concurrent basis with zero friction. Upgrade Schedule: ⏰ Time: April 20, 2026, 6:00 – 8:00 (UTC) - Estimated Duration: 2 Hours What to Expect: - Trade Access: The 'Trade' page (Spot & Perps) will be temporarily offline. During the upgrade, mark prices will not be updated and liquidations will not occur.  However, when the network upgrade is completed, mark prices will be updated to the latest and positions may be liquidated if the market has moved against them during the window. Users are encouraged to review their positions carefully prior to the upgrade and take actions as necessary. If you still have an open position when the upgrade starts, please return to SoDEX and monitor the position as soon as the upgrade is completed. - Wallet Services: Deposits and withdrawals will be paused . - Continuous Access: You can still access your Portfolio, Vault, and Referral pages throughout the process. Superior user experience must be powered by best-in-class infrastructure. Thank you for your support as we make our DEX faster, smoother and stronger! SoDEX Team April 18, 2026

Not sure how on-chain DEX deposits actually work? SoDEX lets you deposit straight from any CEX — same flow as a normal withdrawal on CEX. A few things worth double-checking first: → $5 minimum per deposit — anything less won't credit → Only supported tokens — wrong token = permanent loss → Pick the right network — wrong chain means funds are gone on-chain → Always verify the address — scan the QR or copy-paste, never retype Funds land in a couple of minutes. Then you're ready to open a position. 🎥 SoDEX 101 · How to Deposit Safely 60s walkthrough ↓
